title: sulcorebutia tiraquensis subsp. mariana
intro: Sulcorebutia tiraquensis subsp. mariana is a subspecies of cactus that belongs to the Rebutia family, characterized by its small, globular shape and vibrant yellow flowers. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sulcorebutia tiraquensis subsp. mariana include wound healing, pain relief, and the treatment of various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's extracts are often used to create ointments, salves, and tinctures for topical application.
